/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyRobot.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyRobot.dir/MyRobot.cpp.o -o MyRobot  algorithms/filter/libmyfilter.a external/servo/libservo.a robot_model/librobot_model.a algorithms/planning/libplanning.a algorithms/control/libcontrol.a external/servo_interface/libservo_interface.a external/force_sensor/libforce_sensor.a robot_model/librobot_model.a external/servo/libservo.a
